findings.evidence: `rg -n "covector_eval_single|Finset.sum_eq_single v"` shows `Characteristic.lean:105` defines private `covector_eval_single`, while `Weight.lean:151-158` repeats its proof body.
findings.fix: Promote the existing private `covector_eval_single` from `Characteristic.lean` to a public or local reusable lemma, then rewrite this proof with that lemma before applying `canonicalCharacteristic_apply_add_intersection_single`.
findings.issue: `characteristicWeightNumerator_canonical_single` duplicates the same `Finset.sum_eq_single` proof used for covector evaluation on a basis vector, hiding a reusable fact behind inline proof plumbing.

summary: One proof repeats a reusable basis-evaluation argument instead of exposing the lattice fact it needs, making later weight proofs depend on another inline Finset calculation.
